name: tx-guard
description: Standalone tx-guard skill package (Guarded DeFi Advisor) — the risk-engine core (incl. viem) is bundled into lib/guard-skill.mjs, so the scripts run with Node >= 20 alone: no install, no build step. Guarded FaroSwap quotes/plans (never executes — redirects to the open-source executor) plus read-only market analytics (overview / token info / risk-based allocation ideas).
